Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1994/1996 deep review) merged duplicate event c6baea62-498c-5e3b-87ab-f4e3752666e5 ("Volunteer Park, near Asian Art Museum"). Notes: The Nov. 2, 1996 Capitol Hill event later names Volunteer Park as the start location; that should not remain as a separate venue-based event row.
